emergency_definition: complete AC failure during summer heat wave
carbon monoxide detector alarm related to heating system

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: dispatch the on-call service van and guarantee arrival within 90 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules: collect the caller's name, address, phone number, and a description of the issue, then schedule the next available appointment

emergency.fallback: dispatch the on-call service van and guarantee arrival within 90 minutes

routing_rules.non_emergency: collect the caller's name, address, phone number, and a description of the issue, then schedule the next available appointment

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me take your information and our dispatch team will call you back within 20 minutes.

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
service_area: the greater Atlanta metro area including Marietta
pricing_model: flat-rate pricing for standard repairs and quoted pricing for installations
greeting_style: Thanks for calling Comfort Zone HVAC! You've reached our service line. How may I assist you today?
call_objective: s is to book diagnostic appointments and sell maintenance plans
objection_handling: not sure if repair or replace
follow_up_procedure: send email summary within 2 hours of the service call, then call customer 3 days later to check satisfaction
other_tools: Google Workspace and Mailchimp for marketing
notes: we offer $75 off first repair for new customers.
